becomes the squash commit on main. A CI check enforces it. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands run, cases covered. -->

- [ ] `uv run --extra dev pytest -q tests/mash` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / READMEs if behavior changed
- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit (do **not** edit `CHANGELOG.md` — it's automated)
